subcodes.first_line: O true friend!  Thou art ever before mine eyes, and dearly cherished; before my gaze, and highly respected.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی در نظری و عزیزی و پیش بصری و محترمی رابطه ای در نشئه انسانی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
